misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 I'm getting rooftop vibes; I feel Oda is going all out with this fight. He's really put a lot of work into this setup. After centuries of fighting, Imu, Nidhogg, and Nika are finally fac
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 I'm getting rooftop vibes; I feel Oda is going all out with this fight. He's really put a lot of work into this setup. After centuries of fighting, Imu, Nidhogg, and Nika are finally facing off. Guys, Chapter 1178 is going to be phenomenal, I can feel it...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 I know many people have really high expectations for Usopp in this arc, and I also hope this wasn't the end of it for him. But I thought the scene and Usopp's actions were very well done
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 I know many people have really high expectations for Usopp in this arc, and I also hope this wasn't the end of it for him. But I thought the scene and Usopp's actions were very well done; standing up to Imu like that shows a lot of courage, praying for more🙏

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Love this trio, can´t wait to see more of them, now knowing they gonna face Imu. (that Ragnir scene with Luffy is the new meme for the next month xD).🤣
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Love this trio, can´t wait to see more of them, now knowing they gonna face Imu. (that Ragnir scene with Luffy is the new meme for the next month xD).🤣

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Kilingham getting roasted by Sanji and Franky is peak...🤣🤣🤣 Jinbe is right, Sommers is left, question is if he can heal fast enough after the fatal blow of Luffy. I guess not but who
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Kilingham getting roasted by Sanji and Franky is peak...🤣🤣🤣 Jinbe is right, Sommers is left, question is if he can heal fast enough after the fatal blow of Luffy. I guess not but who knows?

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 Chopper slapped the demon out(kinda reminds me of Black Clover devil), question is how. Pretty much linked to Chopper Devilfruits, since his attack alone wasn´t that strong for the Giant
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 Chopper slapped the demon out(kinda reminds me of Black Clover devil), question is how. Pretty much linked to Chopper Devilfruits, since his attack alone wasn´t that strong for the Giant to transform back, thoughts?

misc.title: [#ONEPIECE1177] In the 6th century, a legendary Chinese philosopher, by the name of “Lao Tzu” said…… “There Is No Greater Danger Than Underestimating Your Opponent” This quote fully embody, Luffy & th
misc.text: [#ONEPIECE1177] In the 6th century, a legendary Chinese philosopher, by the name of “Lao Tzu” said…… “There Is No Greater Danger Than Underestimating Your Opponent” This quote fully embody, Luffy & them right now. Things are going way too well. WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1177 The fact how everything goes smoothly right now is red alarming, people shouldn´t underestimate Imu. We might see soon why Imu is in fact a god tier. Can´t wait for Chapter 1178 — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2034630156040749435#m
